headline.text: ML1 demolding belt at L3 showing *curled pieces* — QA flagged Saturday, supervisor requesting maintenance assessment to evaluate foreign-material risk.

summary: Two process flags in the window — damaged ML1 demolding belt at L3 with curled pieces under maintenance review for potential foreign-material risk, and one truffle pallet completed without IMS label affecting traceability.

food_safety.title: Damaged demolding belt with curled pieces on ML1
food_safety.summary: Belt damage with curled pieces flagged by QA; maintenance reported partial correction but supervisor requesting follow-up assessment to determine if curled pieces pose foreign-material risk.
food_safety.status: Open — supervisor requesting maintenance lead to assess belt and determine if curled pieces can be safely removed.

quality.title: Truffle pallet completed without IMS label
quality.summary: Third shift completed full pallet without applying IMS label despite notification at process start; impacts traceability and inventory accuracy.
quality.status: Open — supervisor adding follow-up action to shift report to address labeling gap with third-shift team.

opportunities.text: Consider adding belt condition inspection to ML1 startup checklist — based on the damaged demolding belt with curled pieces discovered mid-shift by QA.
Consider adding pallet-completion verification step to Truffle Line procedures — based on the full pallet finished without IMS label despite crew notification.
